name: LG_SLLINE_UPD_523_01
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER LG_SLLINE_UPD_523_01  ON LG_523_01_SLTRANS
FOR UPDATE
AS
DECLARE @neww_ITEMREF         INT
DECLARE @neww_VARIANTREF      INT
DECLARE @neww_SLREF         INT
DECLARE @neww_LOCREF          INT
DECLARE @neww_CANCELLED       SMALLINT
DECLARE @neww_AMOUNT          FLOAT
DECLARE @neww_REMAMOUNT       FLOAT
DECLARE @neww_RLNAMOUNT       FLOAT
DECLARE @neww_MAINAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @neww_INSLAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @neww_INSLTRANSREF    INT
DECLARE @neww_INDORDSLTRNREF  INT
DECLARE @oldd_ITEMREF         INT
DECLARE @oldd_VARIANTREF      INT
DECLARE @oldd_SLREF         INT
DECLARE @oldd_LOCREF          INT
DECLARE @oldd_CANCELLED       SMALLINT
DECLARE @oldd_AMOUNT          FLOAT
DECLARE @oldd_REMAMOUNT       FLOAT
DECLARE @oldd_RLNAMOUNT       FLOAT
DECLARE @oldd_MAINAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @oldd_INSLAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @oldd_INSLTRANSREF    INT
DECLARE @oldd_INDORDSLTRNREF  INT
DECLARE @RAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @RLNAMOUNT    FLOAT
DECLARE @Epsilon      FLOAT
DECLARE @INSLREF      INT
DECLARE @SLREF       INT
DECLARE @ITMREF       INT
DECLARE @TMPSLREF      INT
DECLARE @TMPITMREF    INT
DECLARE @OK           FLOAT
DECLARE @SLTYP          INT
DECLARE @MAINAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @INSLAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_RAMOUNT    FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_RLNAMOUNT  FLOAT
DECLARE @IOCODE         INT
DECLARE @LOGICALREF     INT
DECLARE @OLD_MAINAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @OLD_INSLAMOUNT FLOAT
DECLARE @NEW_INSLREF    INT
DECLARE @OK2         INT
DECLARE @FICHETYPE    INT
DECLARE @STFICHEREF    INT
DECLARE @STTRANSREF    INT
DECLARE @TRCODE       INT
DECLARE @AMOUNT       FLOAT
SELECT @neww_ITEMREF        = I.ITEMREF,
       @neww_VARIANTREF     = I.VARIANTREF,
       @neww_SLREF          = I.SLREF,
       @neww_LOCREF         = I.LOCREF,
       @neww_CANCELLED      = I.CANCELLED,
       @neww_AMOUNT         = I.AMOUNT,
       @neww_REMAMOUNT      = I.REMAMOUNT,
       @neww_RLNAMOUNT      = I.REMLNUNITAMNT,
       @neww_MAINAMOUNT     = I.MAINAMOUNT,
       @neww_INSLAMOUNT     = I.INSLAMOUNT,
       @neww_INSLTRANSREF   = I.INSLTRANSREF,
       @neww_INDORDSLTRNREF = I.INDORDSLTRNREF
FROM   INSERTED I
SELECT @oldd_ITEMREF        = D.ITEMREF,
       @oldd_VARIANTREF     = D.VARIANTREF,
       @oldd_SLREF          = D.SLREF,
       @oldd_LOCREF         = D.LOCREF,
       @oldd_CANCELLED      = D.CANCELLED,
       @oldd_AMOUNT         = D.AMOUNT,
       @oldd_REMAMOUNT      = D.REMAMOUNT,
       @oldd_RLNAMOUNT      = D.REMLNUNITAMNT,
       @oldd_MAINAMOUNT     = D.MAINAMOUNT,
       @oldd_INSLAMOUNT     = D.INSLAMOUNT,
       @oldd_INSLTRANSREF   = D.INSLTRANSREF,
       @oldd_INDORDSLTRNREF = D.INDORDSLTRNREF
FROM   DELETED D
IF (@oldd_ITEMREF <> @neww_ITEMREF) OR
   (@oldd_VARIANTREF <> @neww_VARIANTREF) OR
   (@oldd_SLREF <> @neww_SLREF) OR
   (@oldd_LOCREF <> @neww_LOCREF) OR
   (@oldd_CANCELLED <> @neww_CANCELLED) OR
   (@oldd_AMOUNT <> @neww_AMOUNT) OR
   (@oldd_REMAMOUNT <> @neww_REMAMOUNT) OR
   (@oldd_RLNAMOUNT <> @neww_RLNAMOUNT) OR
   (@oldd_MAINAMOUNT <> @neww_MAINAMOUNT) OR
   (@oldd_INSLAMOUNT <> @neww_INSLAMOUNT) OR
   (@oldd_INSLTRANSREF <> @neww_INSLTRANSREF) OR
   (@oldd_INDORDSLTRNREF <> @neww_INDORDSLTRNREF) OR
   (@neww_REMAMOUNT = 0) OR
   (@neww_RLNAMOUNT = 0)
BEGIN SELECT @RAMOUNT        = I.REMAMOUNT,
             @RLNAMOUNT      = I.REMLNUNITAMNT,
             @INSLREF        = I.INSLTRANSREF,
             @SLREF          = I.SLREF,
             @ITMREF         = I.ITEMREF,
             @SLTYP          = I.SLTYPE,
             @IOCODE         = I.IOCODE,
             @LOGICALREF    = I.LOGICALREF,
             @STFICHEREF    = I.STFICHEREF,
             @STTRANSREF    = I.STTRANSREF,
             @TRCODE         = I.FICHETYPE,
             @AMOUNT         = I.AMOUNT,
             @OLD_MAINAMOUNT = I.MAINAMOUNT,
             @OLD_INSLAMOUNT = I.INSLAMOUNT,
             @NEW_INSLREF    = I.INSLTRANSREF,
             @FICHETYPE      = I.FICHETYPE
      FROM   INSERTED I
      SELECT @Epsilon = 0.00000001
      IF @IOCODE IN (1,2)
       SELECT @NEW_INSLREF =  @LOGICALREF
      IF (@NEW_INSLREF > 0)
       UPDATE LG_523_01_SLTRANS
        SET   ITEMREF=ITEMREF
        WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF
      SELECT @OK2=INDORDSLTRNREF
       FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS
       WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55
      IF ISNULL(@OK2,0)=0
       SELECT @MAINAMOUNT = SUM(MAINAMOUNT), @INSLAMOUNT = SUM(INSLAMOUNT)
        FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
        WHERE INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
              AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
              AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
              AND INPLNSLTRANSREF=0
              AND CANCELLED=0
              AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF
                                      FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS
                                      WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55
                                     )
              AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
      IF ISNULL(@OK2,0)<>0
       SELECT @MAINAMOUNT = SUM(MAINAMOUNT), @INSLAMOUNT = SUM(INSLAMOUNT)
        FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
        WHERE INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
              AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
              --AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
              AND CANCELLED=0
              AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF FROM LG_523_01_SLTRANS WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55)
              AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
              AND INDORDSLTRNREF NOT IN (SELECT LOGICALREF
                                          FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
                                          WHERE INSLTRANSREF = @NEW_INSLREF
                                                AND IOCODE IN (3,4)
                                                AND INDORDSLTRNREF=0
                                                AND INPLNSLTRANSREF=0
                                                AND CANCELLED=0
                                                AND LOGICALREF NOT IN (SELECT INDORDSLTRNREF
                                                                        FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS
                                                                        WHERE INSLTRANSREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND FICHETYPE=55)
                                                AND ((FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF>0) OR (FICHETYPE<>10 AND STFICHEREF=0) OR (FICHETYPE=10 AND STFICHEREF>0))
                                        )
       SELECT @NEW_RAMOUNT = ROUND(REMAMOUNT,8), @NEW_RLNAMOUNT = ROUND(REMLNUNITAMNT,8),
              @OLD_MAINAMOUNT=ROUND(MAINAMOUNT,8), @OLD_INSLAMOUNT=ROUND(AMOUNT,8)
        FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS WITH(NOLOCK)
        WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF
       IF ((@OLD_MAINAMOUNT - @NEW_RAMOUNT) <> ISNULL(@MAINAMOUNT,0)) OR ((@OLD_INSLAMOUNT - @NEW_RLNAMOUNT) <> ISNULL(@INSLAMOUNT,0))
        UPDATE LG_523_01_SLTRANS
         SET   REMAMOUNT=ROUND((MAINAMOUNT - ISNULL(@MAINAMOUNT,0)),8), REMLNUNITAMNT=ROUND((AMOUNT - ISNULL(@INSLAMOUNT,0)),8)
         WHERE LOGICALREF=@NEW_INSLREF AND @FICHETYPE<>55
      SELECT @RAMOUNT        = D.REMAMOUNT,
             @RLNAMOUNT      = D.REMLNUNITAMNT,
             @INSLREF        = D.INSLTRANSREF,
             @SLREF          = D.SLREF,
             @ITMREF         = D.ITEMREF,
             @SLTYP          = D.SLTYPE,
             @IOCODE         = D.IOCODE,
             @LOGICALREF    = D.LOGICALREF
      FROM   DELETED D
      SELECT @OK = 0
      IF (@INSLREF <> 0) AND (@SLTYP <> 3)
       BEGIN SELECT @TMPSLREF = SLREF, @TMPITMREF = ITEMREF
              FROM  LG_523_01_SLTRANS
              WHERE LOGICALREF = @INSLREF
             IF ((@TMPSLREF = @SLREF) AND (@TMPITMREF = @ITMREF))
              SELECT @OK = 0
             ELSE
              SELECT @OK = 1
       END
      IF ((@RAMOUNT < (-1 * @Epsilon)) OR (@RLNAMOUNT < (-1 * @Epsilon)) OR (@OK = 1))
       BEGIN RAISERROR('LBS_ERROR=10001', 11, 1)
             ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
       END
END
